item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2024-58348 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2024-58348 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
WordPress Background Image Cropper version 1.2 contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files by accessing the ups.php endpoint. Attackers can upload PHP files through the file upload form in the plugin directory to execute arbitrary code on the server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-58348

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2023-54350 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2023-54350 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
WordPress Augmented-Reality plugin contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the elFinder connector that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP files. Attackers can send POST requests to the connector.minimal.php endpoint with mkfile and put commands to create malicious PHP files in the file_manager directory and execute them on the server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-54350

item.title: [Segurança] Qilin ransomware affiliate exploited Check Point VPN zero-day (CVE-2026-50751) - Help Net Security
item.description:
🚨 Qilin ransomware affiliate exploited Check Point VPN zero-day (CVE-2026-50751) - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-50751 associada a Check Point. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-41722 - VMware
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41722 - VMware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation Operations contains multiple stored cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.A malicious actor with privileges to create policies, views or text-widgets may be able to inject scripts to perform administrative actions in VMware Cloud Foundation Operations.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41722

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8399-1: Pillow vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8399-1: Pillow vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 5.1
Resumo:
It was discovered that Pillow incorrectly handled large glyph advance values in fonts. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Pillow to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-42308) It was discovered that Pillow incorrectly handled nested coordinate lists in certain APIs. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Pillow to crash, resulting in a denial of service. This issue only affec...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8399-1

item.title: [Segurança] Check Point links VPN zero-day attacks to Qilin ransomware gang
item.description:
💣 Check Point links VPN zero-day attacks to Qilin ransomware gang
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Israeli cybersecurity company Check Point has released security updates to patch a critical flaw affecting Remote Access VPN and Mobile Access deployments, which was exploited in zero-day attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/check-point-links-vpn-zero-day-attacks-to-qilin-ransomware-gang/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VCF 9.1で、ゼロトラスト・セキュリティとレジリエンスを強化
item.description:
📰 VCF 9.1で、ゼロトラスト・セキュリティとレジリエンスを強化
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
本日は、弊社Broadcom のプライベートクラウドのネットワーキング、セキュリティ、およびオペレーション分野のマーケットリーダーシップを牽引しているDevyani Pisolkarの投稿をご紹介いたします。ご参照ください。 現代のサイバー脅威は、もはやアプリケーションに対する孤立した攻撃にとどまらず、インフラストラクチャそのものを標的としています。APT（高度持続的脅威）、ランサムウェア、サプライチェーン攻撃は、ワークロードが実行される基盤層を直接狙っています。この基盤に対するセキュリティ確保は、単なる選択肢ではなく、かつては手動によるハッキングに依存していたサイバー攻撃が、AI駆動型で自己進化する攻撃へと変化した現代において、セキュアかつレジリエントなプライベートクラウドインフラストラクチャを運用するための前提条件となっています。 AI導入が拡大するにつれ、セキュリティアーキテクチャは戦略的な優先事項となっています。人、デー...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-japan/2026/06/vcf-9-1zerotrust-security.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8398-1: nginx vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8398-1: nginx vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that nginx incorrectly handled certain cookie headers in the HTTP/2 implementation. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause nginx to consume excessive resources, resulting in a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8398-1

item.title: [Segurança] ⚡ Weekly Recap: Instagram Account Hacks, Android Zero-Day, GitHub Worm and More
item.description:
📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Instagram Account Hacks, Android Zero-Day, GitHub Worm and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Last week had poisoned packages, a broken AI helper, and a worm tearing through repos. And while everyone chased the loud stuff, quieter attackers sat in inboxes for months, reading mail and
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/weekly-recap-instagram-account-hacks.html

item.title: [Segurança] Over 20,000 Instagram accounts stolen in Meta AI support hack
item.description:
📰 Over 20,000 Instagram accounts stolen in Meta AI support hack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Meta has revealed that 20,225 Instagram users had their accounts hijacked in a recent incident where attackers used Meta's AI-powered support system to reset passwords.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/meta-ai-support-data-breach-affects-20-000-instagram-accounts/

item.title: [Segurança] AI Phishing Is Crushing SOCs with Alert Volume: How to Reduce Tier 1 Overload
item.description:
📰 AI Phishing Is Crushing SOCs with Alert Volume: How to Reduce Tier 1 Overload
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers can now create convincing emails, fake login pages, and tailored lures in minutes. Every polished message adds another case for Tier 1 to review, another link to inspect, and another alert that cannot be dismissed at a glance. As the queue grows, a credential theft attempt or malware delivery can easily
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/ai-phishing-is-crushing-socs-with-alert.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8400-1: poppler vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8400-1: poppler vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that poppler incorrectly handled certain malformed PDF tiling patterns in the Splash backend. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code, obtain sensitive information, or cause a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8400-1

item.title: [Segurança] VS Code Adds 2-Hour Extension Auto-Update Delay to Limit Supply Chain Attacks
item.description:
📰 VS Code Adds 2-Hour Extension Auto-Update Delay to Limit Supply Chain Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has announced that Visual Studio Code (VS Code) will apply a two-hour delay before extensions for the integrated development environment (IDE) are updated automatically to a newer version in an attempt to tackle software supply chain threats. "When automatic updates are enabled, new versions are auto-updated two hours after they are published, adding an extra layer of protection
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/vs-code-adds-2-hour-extension-auto.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Multiple VMware Stored XSS Vulnerabilities Allow Attackers to Inject Malicious Scripts - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
📰 Multiple VMware Stored XSS Vulnerabilities Allow Attackers to Inject Malicious Scripts - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia relata uma falha do tipo XSS associada a VMware, com risco de execução de scripts maliciosos no contexto da aplicação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Achieve Speed, Scale, and Reliability of Virtual Machine Deployments with ‘cloud-init’
item.description:
📰 Achieve Speed, Scale, and Reliability of Virtual Machine Deployments with ‘cloud-init’
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In today’s enterprise environments, deploying cloud infrastructure via consistent, version-controlled configurations is non-negotiable. While many view these capabilities strictly through the lens of automation and labor reduction, the deeper value lies in configuration integrity. The real goal is ensuring the environment continuously matches its desired state, which is exactly where Infrastructure as Code (IaC) come...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/08/achieve-speed-scale-and-reliability-of-virtual-machine-deployments-with-cloud-init/
